title: Epic RPG: Lost Teleport
description: A balanced and fair teleportation, powered by Redstone and linked by a special item. A new way to manage how people move around the world.
body:
Fed up with overpowered teleport spam? Restore balance with the teleport node system.

LostTeleport was built to help players return home from distant places—without breaking game balance. The system includes cooldowns to prevent abuse and uses uncommon materials, giving value to items often overlooked by other mods. It’s not instant or free: it demands effort, preparation, and intention. It was also designed to blend naturally with the vanilla environment, respecting its logic and aesthetic.



--------------------------------------------------------------
• Teleport Node 
   - Activates only via redstone blocks, redstone torches, or powered redstone dust
   - Ignores levers, buttons, pressure plates, and other manual triggers
   - Can be linked to another node using the Linker
   - Emits visual feedback when active or in cooldown

![node](https://i.ibb.co/QvFXFfPr/lost-teleport-node-off.png)

--------------------------------------------------------------
• Linker
   - Right-click a node to store its position, then right-click another to complete the link
   - The linked node’s position is saved and displayed directly in the item’s tooltip
   - Reusable
   - One-way linking: the second node becomes the teleport destination

![linker](https://i.ibb.co/dJwHdKhp/teleport-link.png)

--------------------------------------------------------------
• Teleport Crystal
   - Consumable item used to initiate teleportation
   - Must be channeled while standing on an active node
   - Teleport succeeds only if both nodes are powered and linked
   - Crystal is consumed on success

![crystal](https://i.ibb.co/ynD1r3sq/teleport-focus-crystal.png)
